raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX XXXX They had remove the money off of my account the original dispute. 
When I went to my account somedays later, it reappeared on my account I inquired what's going on, they said they did an investigation determine I was responsible I wrote them a letter explain to them I never been to Kentucky nor the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX I dont gamble, They did not do a thorough job of looking into the matter, didnt check with the airlines to see if I had traveled there.You can see on the documents sent to me, the wrong phone number and e-mail address are not mine.
